description: Fix the [AGENT] GitHub issue template (.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent.md) so every command matches the real Makefile targets and on-disk harness layout.

userStories.title: Correct the provisioning and enter-sandbox commands
userStories.description: As an orchestrator following the [AGENT] template, I want the provisioning commands to be real Makefile targets so copy-pasting them works instead of erroring.
acceptanceCriteria: In '### 1. Provision the agent', 'make NAME=<agent-name> quickstart' is replaced with 'make sandbox'.

The 'This will:' bullets accurately describe what 'make sandbox' does (runs 'docker compose up -d --build' to build/start the sandbox container) and no longer claim a make target auto-creates a worktree or branch.

The provisioning narrative notes the per-agent branch (agent/<agent-name>) and worktree (worktree_path from the Metadata block) are created manually via 'git worktree add' per context/rules/git.md, so the preserved Metadata fields stay coherent.

In '### 2. Enter the sandbox', 'make NAME=<agent-name> shell' is replaced with 'make shell <agent-name>' (positional container-arg form), with a parenthetical noting the arg is the container name (defaults to openharness / harness.yaml sandbox.name) and that SHELL_USER=<user> may be appended.
Run from repo root, 'grep -nE "quickstart|NAME=" .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent.md' returns no matches.

userStories.title: Correct the verify checklist
userStories.description: As an orchestrator validating a freshly-provisioned sandbox, I want the verify checklist to use real commands and true assertions so a healthy sandbox actually passes.
acceptanceCriteria: In '### 3. Verify', 'make list' is replaced with 'make ps'.

The checklist no longer asserts SOUL.md and MEMORY.md are present under workspace/; it reflects the real layout (SOUL.md in context/, MEMORY.md in memory/) and narrows the workspace-presence assertion to 'workspace/AGENTS.md is present', with a non-exhaustive note that workspace/ also holds startup.sh and .claude/.
Container-interior steps (e.g. 'ls ~/harness/workspace') are explicitly labeled as run inside the sandbox (after 'make shell'); host-side steps ('make ps') are distinguished.
Every command in the Verify checklist maps to a real Makefile target or a path that exists in its stated execution context.
Run from repo root, 'grep -nE "make list" .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent.md' returns no matches.

userStories.title: Preserve unchanged sections and template validity
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the non-broken parts of the template untouched and the file still a valid GitHub issue template so the change is minimal.
acceptanceCriteria: All content above '### 1. Provision the agent' (frontmatter lines 1-7, ## Identity, ## Context, ## Workspace Setup -> ### Metadata) is unchanged; the Metadata branch/worktree_path fields are intentionally preserved as real conventions.
The YAML frontmatter still opens/closes with '---': 'head -n 7 .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent.md | grep -c "^---$"' returns 2.
Only .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent.md is modified: 'git diff --name-only' lists exactly that one path.
